title: eragrostis megastachya subsp. pooides
intro: Eragrostis megastachya subsp. pooides is a sub-species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation. The plant's extracts are believed to possess antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating cough, and promoting digestion. Eragrostis megastachya subsp. pooides is often prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
